content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by integrating a HyDE-like hypothetical generation step into their memory sampling loop, where the agent generates hypothetical traces of its own prior reasoning when querying long-term memory, not just retrieving existing stored memory embeddings. This turns passive memory lookup becomes an active, query-expansion process aligned with the agent’s current uncertainty and learning goal.
